name: Does location matter for Siri results in cities like Austin or Denver?
description: Yes. Clean local signals help Siri connect your business to nearby searches.

mainEntity.name: Does location matter for Siri results in cities like Austin or Denver?

acceptedAnswer.text: Local businesses should prioritize location pages, service-area clarity, and consistent listings across the places customers are likely to check. If someone in Denver or San Diego asks Siri for a nearby option, the assistant needs a clean geographic signal to connect your business to that request. Adding city-specific pages can help, but only if they are genuinely useful and not duplicated fluff.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Clean local signals help Siri connect your business to nearby searches.
